app_info.subtitle: Post to social media
app_info.description: SimplePost helps users work with connected social accounts from ChatGPT: list available accounts, upload generated or attached media, validate drafts on request, preview post targets and timing when requested, then publish immediately or schedule posts for later.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only retrieves the authenticated user's connected SimplePost account metadata.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not change public internet state or external third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, publish, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Downloads a user-provided ChatGPT file parameter to the authenticated user's SimplePost storage and returns a new media URL.
justifications.open_world_justification: Creates a publicly fetchable media URL that can be used outside ChatGPT and by social platforms when posting.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, publish a post, or perform an irreversible platform action.

justifications.read_only_justification: Checks draft text and media URLs against platform validation rules without creating records or posting.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not write to public internet state or external third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, publish, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Resolves targets, media count, scheduled time, and validation status without creating or publishing a post.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not write to SimplePost, public internet state, or external third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, publish, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Creates a SimplePost post record and may update its status after attempting platform posting.
justifications.open_world_justification: Can publish user-confirmed content to connected external social platforms or schedule it for later publication.
justifications.destructive_justification: Immediate posting sends public social content to external platforms, which may not be reversible through this app.

test_cases.description: List connected social accounts before starting a posting workflow.
test_cases.user_prompt: Which SimplePost accounts can I post from?
test_cases.expected_output: Returns the user's connected accounts with account IDs, platform names, and display metadata for selecting targets.

test_cases.description: Validate a text-only draft against selected accounts.
test_cases.user_prompt: Check whether this post is valid for my connected X and LinkedIn accounts: Shipping the new release notes today.
test_cases.expected_output: Reports whether the draft is valid for the selected accounts and surfaces any platform-specific errors or warnings.

test_cases.description: Preview a scheduled post with a public media URL.
test_cases.user_prompt: Preview this for my Instagram account tomorrow at 9 AM Berlin time using https://example.com/photo.jpg: New product photos are live.
test_cases.expected_output: Shows resolved target account details, media count, scheduled time with timezone, and validation results without creating the post.

test_cases.description: Upload a generated or attached ChatGPT image when no public URL is available.
test_cases.user_prompt: Upload this generated image as launch.png so I can attach it to a SimplePost draft.
test_cases.expected_output: Uses the ChatGPT file parameter, not base64 media data, and returns a publicly fetchable SimplePost media URL with file type, filename, size, and MIME type.

test_cases.description: Schedule a confirmed post for later publication.
test_cases.user_prompt: Schedule the confirmed post 'Office hours start at 16:00 CET' for my Telegram channel tomorrow at 16:00 Europe/Berlin.
test_cases.expected_output: Creates a scheduled SimplePost post for the selected account after create_post performs internal validation, then returns the scheduled status and posting summary.

test_cases.description: Publish a confirmed multi-post thread to a thread-capable account.
test_cases.user_prompt: Post this confirmed two-part thread now to my selected X account. Root: We shipped media uploads for ChatGPT-generated images. Reply: The posting tool should validate internally, so skip a separate validation call.
test_cases.expected_output: Creates the root post and follow-up thread segment after create_post performs internal validation, then returns per-account posting and thread results.

test_cases.description: Publish a confirmed post immediately and inspect platform results.
test_cases.user_prompt: Post this now to my selected X account: We just shipped the May update. I confirm the content and target account.
test_cases.expected_output: Creates the post after create_post performs internal validation, attempts immediate publication, and returns per-platform success or failure results for the selected account.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for connecting or reauthorizing accounts.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Connect my new Instagram account to SimplePost.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not invoke MCP tools because account connection and reauthorization must happen in the SimplePost web app.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for editing or canceling scheduled posts.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Cancel the SimplePost post I scheduled for Friday.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not invoke MCP tools because the MCP server does not list, edit, or cancel scheduled posts.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for unrelated calendar scheduling.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Schedule a team meeting tomorrow at 10 AM.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because meeting scheduling is outside SimplePost's supported social posting workflows.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for generic writing help with no intent to use SimplePost.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Write three short caption ideas for a product launch.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked unless the user asks to validate, preview, upload media for, publish, or schedule through SimplePost.
